title: IBILI Triply Natural Tri-Ply Frying Pan, 22 cm, Stainless Steel, Suitable for Induction, Non-Stick
features: Made of three-layer material: 18/10 stainless steel on top face + inner aluminum + 18% stainless steel on bottom face, stainless steel handle.
Triply Natural Cooking is a non stick frying pan

Stainless steel base for energy efficiency on induction hobs, sandblasted interior treatment for easy cleaning and prevent rusting, Sturdy construction: the coffee maker is built with quality stainless steel and aluminum, strength and durability in daily use
Suitable for all types of cookers, including induction, also suitable for ovens
The stainless steel provides strength and robustness, while the inner aluminum provides a fast and homogenous heat conductivity
It is designed for those looking for a greener and healthier alternative to cooking
description: From the manufacturer Triply Natural Collection No chemical coatings, PFOA and PTFE free. Suitable for all hobs and ovens. Triply Natural Cooking A more natural and durable kitchen. Designed for those looking for a more sustainable and healthy alternative without sacrificing quality and performance in the kitchen. Made of three-layer material, top quality stainless steel in the outer layers and integrated aluminum. Perfect for searing meats, sautéing vegetables or preparing recipes that require total control in cooking, it allows you to cook intense flavors and perfect textures. No chemical coatings, PFOA and PTFE free. Even heat distribution throughout the piece, maximum efficiency Frying pan suitable for all hobs and ovens. Heat insulated stainless steel handle.
